title: Search Engine Optimization
description: Boost your visibility on search engines with data-driven SEO strategies. We handle keyword research, on-page optimization, technical audits, and link building to drive organic traffic that converts.
details: Comprehensive site audit to identify technical issues and opportunities
Keyword strategy tailored to your industry and competition
On-page optimization including meta tags, headings, and internal linking
High-quality link building to boost domain authority
Monthly reporting with clear KPIs and action items
heroText: We help businesses rank higher on Google and attract qualified organic visitors through proven SEO strategies.

title: Pay-Per-Click Advertising
description: Maximize your ROI with targeted PPC campaigns across Google Ads, Meta, and LinkedIn. We manage bidding, ad copy, and audience targeting so every dollar works harder.
details: Campaign strategy aligned with your business goals and budget
Ad copywriting and creative design that drives clicks
Audience targeting and segmentation for maximum relevance
Ongoing bid management and performance optimization
Detailed ROI reporting and conversion tracking
heroText: Get in front of the right people at the right time with precision-targeted paid campaigns.

title: Social Media Marketing
description: Build a loyal community and amplify your brand voice across social platforms. From content calendars to engagement strategies, we turn followers into customers.
details: Platform-specific strategy for Instagram, LinkedIn, TikTok, and more
Content calendar creation and scheduling
Community management and engagement
Paid social advertising with audience targeting
Performance analytics and monthly reporting
heroText: Grow your brand presence and engage your audience where they spend their time.

title: Email Marketing
description: Nurture leads and drive repeat business with personalized email campaigns. We design, write, and automate sequences that keep your audience engaged and coming back.
details: Email strategy development aligned with your sales funnel
Beautiful, responsive email design and templates
Automation workflows for welcome series, nurture, and re-engagement
A/B testing to optimize subject lines, copy, and CTAs
List segmentation and deliverability optimization
heroText: Turn your email list into a powerful revenue channel with targeted, automated campaigns.

title: Content Creation
description: Compelling content that tells your story and ranks on search. Our team produces blog posts, landing pages, infographics, and video scripts tailored to your audience.
details: Content strategy based on keyword research and audience intent
Long-form blog posts optimized for SEO and readability
Landing page copy designed for conversions
Visual content including infographics and social graphics
Video scripts for explainers, ads, and social content
heroText: Stand out with high-quality content that educates, engages, and converts your audience.

title: Analytics & Tracking
description: Make decisions backed by data. We set up GA4, conversion tracking, and custom dashboards so you always know what is working and where to invest next.
details: GA4 implementation and configuration
Conversion tracking setup across all channels
Custom dashboards for real-time performance insights
Attribution modeling to understand the full customer journey
Monthly reports with actionable recommendations
heroText: Get the insights you need to make smarter marketing decisions with proper tracking and analytics.
